reviews.review_description:
I have a tony little strider. My treadmill broke, so I got something less expensive, however still staring at a blank wall or out a window was looking for something nature like so I could walk through the trails such as I had with my Treadmill. I went to make an account, it won’t let me doesn’t give an option But the previews look absolutely wonderful. I really wish you would fix it. 
Today is March 8, 2026. It looks like it should’ve been updated and fixed by now. Perhaps you’ve just given up on it. That’s just a shame because I haven’t seen anything else like it. I was so excited about trying to use itat 62 years old. 
Sometimes we need just a little bit of help and exercising that isn’t complicated and heavy physically. Please fix it. Please let us play your game. it’s like dangling a carrot in front of bunny.  I’d give it zero stars however I’m gonna give it a one because it looks like it’s gonna be an awesome game once it does work.
￼
￼
I went to use it but can not log in, how to we get through log in details
I get that app is still in development but unable to access.  Where would I get the OTP to enter for log in.  Should have read reviews first.  No way to contact developers or customer support
This app would be fantastic to have.  Really disappointed it is not working.

This would be an app I would use daily, especially in icy/snowy conditions.  Sadly, Im unable to use it in my Meta.  I get a 'begin OTP' and a 'LOGIN' button but can use neither.  Hope you fix this so we can get into it.  Im eager to see how it looks and acts
Can’t get past the login, what a ripoff.
Also looking forward to it but could not sign in, disappointing
I was really looking forward to this app but never could access it.
I downloaded to my quest 3 it opened to a login screen but you cant login. So how do we get this to work?
